title: lindsaea cyclophylla
intro: Lindsaea cyclophylla, also known as the Lindsaea fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea cyclophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
